ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-07-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Thomas Mazzera for and with William Wallace.

The Court stated that it received the recent filings, that it agrees to waive notice and confirmed that there are not objections. The Petition for Final Distribution was taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)

Off Calendar Sep-26-2016 Continued To Oct-24-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Executor William J. Wallace and the Attorney Thomas Mazzera to appear on October 24, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why the examiner's notes have not been responded to. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Grimaldi. (Not Reported)
